chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 363 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 3282/2023 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on MA 3283/2023 4.For hearing of main case. 09-06-2023 Applicant Ishfaque Hussain Laghari present person. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Applicant is present in person and submits that he will be satisfied if directions are given to the official respondent No.3/SHO, P.S, Mirwah to act in accordance with law and that he shall not harass, intimidate and threaten the applicant Mr. Ishfaque Hussain Laghari and if Mr. Laghari approaches the said P.S, he shall also be dealt with in accordance with law. Mr. Laghari is satisfied with such observations and does not wish to press the instant Crl. Misc. Application further, which stands disposed of accordingly along with listed applications. JUDGE Ahmad
